title: jaltomata auriculata
intro: Jaltomata auriculata, also known as the golden flowered jaltomata, is a species of flowering plant in the nightshade family that is native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Jaltomata auriculata include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as teas and tinctures, can be made from its leaves and flowers to harness its medicinal properties and take advantage of its health benefits.
